title: Compass Clock Fixer
description: Simple resource pack to fix compasses/clocks not working outside the Overworld.
body:
As of Minecraft 1.21.4, the Compass and Clock items are driven by the resource pack.  
Outside of the vanilla overworld, compasses/clocks spin franticly.   
This becomes an issue when using custom dimensions.

Bukkit based servers allow you to set the compass target of a player, which doesn't work in MC 1.21.4+.

This pack fixes this issue with 2 small changes:
- Compasses now only spin franticly in the vanilla nether and end dimensions.
- Clocks now only spin franticly in the vanilla nether and end dimensions.

Compasses and clocks can now work as intended in custom dimensions.
